prompt: Create a realistic lifestyle sports photograph of a young female tennis player on an outdoor tennis court during warm golden-hour sunlight. She is standing behind a slightly out-of-focus tennis net in the foreground, leaning forward and looking downward so her face is mostly hidden by a white baseball cap. She has tan skin, dark hair tucked behind the cap, an athletic build, and wears a fitted black sleeveless athletic tank top with a pale pink pleated tennis skirt. A large round pale pink tennis racket bag hangs from her left shoulder, and she is reaching with her right hand into a black wire basket filled with many pale pink tennis balls; one pink ball is held near the top of the basket. The scene should feel candid and editorial, with a beige concrete wall and faint court lines in the background, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, and no visible text or logos. Use vertical portrait framing, subject cropped around the lower legs, with the basket on the lower right and the round bag on the lower left, emphasizing pastel pink tennis accessories and a fashionable sporty aesthetic.
